title: Dark Loading Screen - Creeper Edition
description: A dark themed loading screen with a creeper face.
body:
### This resource pack is based of Youtuber Creeper Loading Screen from Vexcenot, but is a dark themed version of that pack and also with a intention to fix any problem with newer versions of the game if it arises.

# Link to Other Projects
- Youtuber Creeper Loading Pack:
> https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/youtube-creeper-loading-screen
- Potassium Modpack (Has this resource pack on it by default)
> https://modrinth.com/modpack/potassium
